compressed_prompt:
Titan makes clothing for large men. Write an advertisement for the company that would appeal to a wide audience. Make sentences short. Your response should not contain any comma.
Titan makes clothing for large men. Craft an ad appealing to a broad audience. Keep sentences concise. No commas in the text.
response:
**TITAN: BIG STYLE FOR BIG MEN**

Look good. Feel great. Dress your best.

Titan designs clothes for men who demand fit and comfort. No more squeezing into tight sleeves. No more settling for dull colors. Just sharp styles made for you.

From workwear to weekend looks Titan has you covered. Durable fabrics. Perfect cuts. Confidence in every stitch.

Big men deserve big style. Titan delivers.

Shop now and step out bold.
